PerformancePilot
DashboardNew Audit

Settings

Configure thresholds and defaults

Core Web Vitals Thresholds
Customize the thresholds used to classify metrics as Good, Needs Improvement, or Poor. Values are based on Google's Core Web Vitals.

Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)

Loading performance

Unit: ms

Interaction to Next Paint (INP)

Interactivity

Unit: ms

Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)

Visual stability

Unit: none

First Contentful Paint (FCP)

First content appearance

Unit: ms

Time to First Byte (TTFB)

Server response time

Unit: ms
